payload.answer: Denied. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands, and no memory deletion or durable memory update was performed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted administrative SQL command from a normal user and does not provide durable user memory to store.

details: Rejected attempted admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
No memory cards were created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: If you intended to manage your own memories, use supported non-admin memory management commands.
Contact an authorized administrator for administrative database operations.
